content: altool notarization deprecated; uploads rejected since Nov 1 2023. notarytool (Xcode 14+/standalone, macOS 10.15.7+, no full Xcode needed) is current, per Apple TN3147. IMPORTANT distinction: notarytool is for Developer ID direct distribution, NOT the Mac App Store. Mac App Store apps upload via Xcode Organizer / Transporter to App Store Connect and go through App Review; they are signed with Apple Distribution + Mac App Store provisioning profile and are processed/ticketed by Apple automatically (no separate notarytool step). App Sandbox mandatory; no private frameworks (MediaRemote must be removed from shipping path).
